report_fields.MISSION ANCHOR: Fully implement `pi-code-index` across all explicitly documented project phases available in the repository, starting from the normative Phase 1 MVP and continuing through any additional concrete phase specs, while preserving the documented architecture of a thin pi extension backed by a local daemon.
report_fields.Contract coverage: pass - `P1-CTRL-DAEMON-SPINE` acceptance criteria are met by the committed slice: the extension command is thin and routes through a real daemon client (`src/extension/commands/index-command.ts`, `src/extension/daemon-client.ts`), the daemon exposes the required control-plane methods over a Unix socket (`src/daemon/server.ts`), repo identity is canonicalized from git root + git dir/worktree (`src/extension/daemon-client.ts`, `src/shared/protocol.ts`), and baseline/overlay SQLite anchors are created with durable metadata (`src/daemon/sqlite-store.ts`).
report_fields.Correctness risk: pass - The implementation matches the intended seam split: repo lifecycle, IPC, singleton behavior, and storage anchors live in daemon code; the extension is limited to command registration, repo resolution, and formatting. Socket/cache permissions are private (`src/daemon/server.ts`), protocol mismatch is surfaced explicitly (`src/extension/daemon-client.ts`), and repo runtime status/doctor output is truthful for this metadata-only slice (`src/daemon/repo-runtime.ts`).
report_fields.Verification evidence: pass - Recorded evidence is present in `.agent/current/verification-evidence.json`, and the committed HEAD `329dab218489e7abf9ad579f006eb671d032a6b3` still passes `npm run check` and `npm test`. The test suite directly covers lazy-start/handshake, non-git refusal, and `/index enable -> /index status -> /index doctor` with SQLite metadata assertions (`tests/control-plane.test.ts`).
report_fields.Docs/state parity: pass - The active slice contract, plan evidence, implementation surfaces, and verification summary align with the committed code. No contract drift or unresolved `must_fix_findings` are present in `.agent/current/active-slice.json`.

report_text:
MISSION ANCHOR: Fully implement `pi-code-index` across all explicitly documented project phases available in the repository, starting from the normative Phase 1 MVP and continuing through any additional concrete phase specs, while preserving the documented architecture of a thin pi extension backed by a local daemon.
Remaining contract IDs: P1-CTRL-DAEMON-SPINE, P1-INDEX-STORAGE-PIPELINE, P1-TOOLS-DIAGNOSTICS

Rubric:
- Contract coverage: pass - `P1-CTRL-DAEMON-SPINE` acceptance criteria are met by the committed slice: the extension command is thin and routes through a real daemon client (`src/extension/commands/index-command.ts`, `src/extension/daemon-client.ts`), the daemon exposes the required control-plane methods over a Unix socket (`src/daemon/server.ts`), repo identity is canonicalized from git root + git dir/worktree (`src/extension/daemon-client.ts`, `src/shared/protocol.ts`), and baseline/overlay SQLite anchors are created with durable metadata (`src/daemon/sqlite-store.ts`).
- Correctness risk: pass - The implementation matches the intended seam split: repo lifecycle, IPC, singleton behavior, and storage anchors live in daemon code; the extension is limited to command registration, repo resolution, and formatting. Socket/cache permissions are private (`src/daemon/server.ts`), protocol mismatch is surfaced explicitly (`src/extension/daemon-client.ts`), and repo runtime status/doctor output is truthful for this metadata-only slice (`src/daemon/repo-runtime.ts`).
- Verification evidence: pass - Recorded evidence is present in `.agent/current/verification-evidence.json`, and the committed HEAD `329dab218489e7abf9ad579f006eb671d032a6b3` still passes `npm run check` and `npm test`. The test suite directly covers lazy-start/handshake, non-git refusal, and `/index enable -> /index status -> /index doctor` with SQLite metadata assertions (`tests/control-plane.test.ts`).
- Docs/state parity: pass - The active slice contract, plan evidence, implementation surfaces, and verification summary align with the committed code. No contract drift or unresolved `must_fix_findings` are present in `.agent/current/active-slice.json`.

Findings: none.

Acceptable as-is: yes
Smallest follow-up slice: none; proceed to completion-auditor.

report_fields.Canonical re-ground applied: yes - reconciled post-review canonical state by accepting reviewed slice `p1-control-plane-and-repo-lifecycle`, updating `.agent/current/state.json`, `.agent/current/plan.json`, and selecting the next slice in `.agent/current/active-slice.json`.
report_fields.Acceptance criteria revalidated: yes - reviewer pass/acceptance in `.agent/current/slice-history.jsonl`, existing verification evidence in `.agent/current/verification-evidence.json`, clean repo at reviewed HEAD `329dab218489e7abf9ad579f006eb671d032a6b3`, and plan evidence remain consistent with repo truth for the accepted slice; remaining slices still truthfully stay unsatisfied/planned.
report_fields.Exact handoff payload: {"schema_version":1,"mission_anchor":"Fully implement `pi-code-index` across all explicitly documented project phases available in the repository, starting from the normative Phase 1 MVP and continuing through any additional concrete phase specs, while preserving the documented architecture of a thin pi extension backed by a local daemon.","task_type":"completion-workflow","evaluation_profile":"completion-rubric-v1","status":"selected","slice_id":"p1-index-storage-and-analysis","goal":"Implement the Phase 1 indexing core: git-aware discovery and safety filtering, transactional SQLite baseline plus overlay lifecycle, TS/JS structural fact extraction, coarse non-primary fallback summaries, and truthful `/index disable` plus `/index reindex` state transitions.","contract_ids":["P1-INDEX-STORAGE-PIPELINE"],"acceptance_criteria":["Git-aware file discovery is bounded to the canonical repo root and finds eligible files via tracked files, modified tracked files, and untracked non-ignored files only, while enforcing the Phase 1 hard safety boundaries, default excludes, sensitive-file denylist, binary detection, and 2 MiB size cap.","The daemon maintains one immutable baseline DB per commit and one mutable overlay DB per worktree, commits query-visible writes transactionally, and answers status or doctor with truthful coverage, pending-file, and storage metadata.","TS/JS files receive structural symbol, import, export, reference, and file-summary extraction with `analysisQuality: structural`, while non-primary languages receive coarse file-summary fallback with `analysisQuality: basic` only.","`/index disable` stops repo background activity without purging cache by default, `/index reindex` performs a soft rebuild, and deterministic tests exercise `initializing`, `indexing`, `ready`, `stale`, `error`, and `disabled` transitions."],"priority":2,"why_now":"A real control plane and repo registration path are prerequisite for truthful indexing, storage, and lifecycle semantics.","blocked_on":[],"locked_notes":["One immutable baseline DB per commit plus one mutable overlay DB per worktree is mandatory in Phase 1.","TS/JS are the only primary structural analyzers; non-primary languages must stay coarse/fallback-only in MVP."],"must_fix_findings":[],"implementation_surfaces":["package.json","src/daemon/repo-runtime.ts","src/daemon/server.ts","src/daemon/sqlite-store.ts","src/daemon/tsjs-analyzer.ts","src/shared/protocol.ts"],"verification_commands":["npm run check","npm test"],"basis_commit":"329dab218489e7abf9ad579f006eb671d032a6b3","remaining_contract_ids_before":["P1-INDEX-STORAGE-PIPELINE","P1-TOOLS-DIAGNOSTICS"],"release_blocker_count_before":2,"high_value_gap_count_before":0}
report_fields.Canonical blockers or deviations: none; canonical state had been stale on `post_commit_review`/`completion-reviewer`, and is now advanced truthfully to `implementation`/`completion-implementer` with the accepted slice removed from unsatisfied contract IDs and release blockers.
